Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The FoundDevice method returns whether the most recent successful call to EnumerateDevices located at least one graphics device compatible with the underlying renderer plugin.

This method reports the unfiltered enumeration result. It is not affected by calls to the filtering methods. A call to GetFilteredDevices may return an empty list after filters have been applied, while this method still returns true because one or more compatible devices were found during enumeration.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if at least one compatible graphics device was found during the most recent enumeration, false otherwise.
